_comment: Minimal config — core plugins only. Suitable for local-first personal assistant.
_comment_plugins: Informational — install.sh installs all plugins. This list shows which plugins this profile is designed around.
_comment_tokens: ghToken is required for mc-board issue sync. Get one at https://github.com/settings/tokens (scopes: repo, read:org).
_comment_optional: anthropicToken is used by the OpenClaw runtime for LLM calls. Set it here or via ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env var.
